item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:write","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The inlined make block is locally self-contained and never links X to creating the marks, so bind X's mark-making output to the lasting surface marks or flag the lossiness."}
